name: solo-claude
description: Claude Code marketplace for solo developers and small teams working in a monorepo, tracking issues on GitHub, and writing docs directly in the repo. One plugin, opinionated defaults.

plugins.name: solo-claude
plugins.description: Single plugin bundling solo-friendly skills: code-review, release-notes, documentation-check, docs-update, repo-audit, repo-verifier, docs-author, github-issue-creator, github-issue-implementer, workflow-hygiene-check, scaffold-repo-meta, decision-ledger, and the planning chain (requirements-intake, package-context-scan, solution-design, delivery-plan, plan-new-work). Ships a CLAUDE.md template and the GitHub MCP endpoint.
